properties.name: MCA Central 400 kV: Lapsiphedi-Ratmate
properties.geometry_basis: Manual route-level trace from MCA Annex D-1 baseline alignment atlas, cross-checked against MCC Compact segment topology and RPGCL map labels.
properties.notes: One of five MCA Central 400 kV project segments. Sheet range is assigned from atlas page order and official segment proportions; contact-sheet review outputs retain page-level audit context.

properties.name: MCA Central 400 kV: Ratmate-New Hetauda
properties.geometry_basis: Manual route-level trace from MCA Annex D-1 baseline alignment atlas, cross-checked against MCC Compact segment topology and RPGCL map labels.
properties.notes: This segment branches south from Ratmate to New Hetauda. It shares the exact Ratmate coordinate with the Lapsiphedi and New Damauli segments to preserve topology.

properties.name: MCA Central 400 kV: Ratmate-New Damauli
properties.geometry_basis: Manual route-level trace from MCA Annex D-1 baseline alignment atlas, cross-checked against MCC Compact segment topology and RPGCL map labels.
properties.notes: This segment is the westward Ratmate branch toward New Damauli. It shares the exact Ratmate and New Damauli coordinates with adjacent MCA segments.

properties.name: MCA Central 400 kV: New Damauli-New Butwal
properties.geometry_basis: Manual route-level trace from MCA Annex D-1 baseline alignment atlas, cross-checked against MCC Compact segment topology and RPGCL map labels.
properties.notes: This segment continues the western MCA corridor from New Damauli to New Butwal. It shares exact endpoint coordinates with the adjacent New Damauli and border-link segments.

properties.name: MCA Central 400 kV: New Butwal-India border
properties.geometry_basis: Manual route-level trace from MCA Annex D-1 baseline alignment atlas, cross-checked against MCC Compact segment topology, RPGCL map labels, and the processed Gorakhpur-New Butwal border gateway.
properties.notes: Nepal-side border link only. This segment ends at the processed Belahiya/New Butwal border-corridor gateway and does not guess the Indian-side route.
